jamie-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Can be canceled until the 1st active frame
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

jamie-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

jamie-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
Can be canceled until the 2nd active frame

jamie-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

jamie-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Hard knockdown when hitting an opponent standing on the ground
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
1 frames of recovery added when the attack misses
Second attack is considered a high attack only when the first attack is blocked

jamie-jump-light-punch.name: Jumping Light Punch
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

jamie-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

jamie-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

tensei-kick.name: Tensei Kick
notes: A launching kick that can immediately be jumped out of on hit
Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits

phantom-sway-2.name: Phantom Sway (2)
notes: A sequence of attacks, the first of which cannot be blocked standing. Your drink level will go up after the part of the attack where you take a drink is complete

phantom-sway-3.name: Phantom Sway (3)
notes: A sequence of attacks, the first of which cannot be blocked standing. Your drink level will go up after the part of the attack where you take a drink is complete
Adds 1 Drink level at frame 56
If Drink Level is at 4, recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

falling-star-kick.name: Falling Star Kick
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching

hermits-elbow.name: Hermit's Elbow
notes: An elbow strike that can be canceled into Super Arts. This move's effect changes at drink level 3, making it more powerful

sensei-kick.name: Sensei Kick
notes: A lunging kick that can be canceled into Super Arts. This move's effect changes at drink level 4, making it more powerful

bitter-strikes-1.name: Bitter Strikes (1) (Drink level 1+)
bitter-strikes-1.name_ja: 苦撃（1段目 酔いLv1以上）
notes: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher

bitter-strikes-2.name: Bitter Strikes (2) (Drink level 1+)
bitter-strikes-2.name_ja: 苦撃（2段目 酔いLv1以上）
notes: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher

bitter-strikes-3.name: Bitter Strikes (3) (Drink level 1+)
bitter-strikes-3.name_ja: 苦撃（3段目 酔いLv1以上）
notes: Available at Drink Level 1 or higher
2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

full-moon-kick-1.name: Full Moon Kick (1)
notes: A sequence of attacks, the first of which cannot be blocked crouching. Your drink level will go up after the part of the attack where you take a drink is complete

full-moon-kick-2.name: Full Moon Kick (2) (Drink level 2+)
notes: Available at Drink Level 2 and higher

full-moon-kick-3.name: Full Moon Kick (3) (Drink level 2+)
notes: Available at Drink Level 2 and higher
Adds 1 Drink level at frame 54
If Drink Level is at 4, recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

intoxicated-assault-1.name: Intoxicated Assault (1) (Drink level 3+)
intoxicated-assault-1.name_ja: 酩酊襲 （1段目 酔いLv3以上）
notes: A counter followed by a sequence of attacks
Available at Drink Level 3 or higher

intoxicated-assault-2.name: Intoxicated Assault (2) (Drink level 3+)
intoxicated-assault-2.name_ja: 酩酊襲 （2段目 酔いLv3以上）
notes: A counter followed by a sequence of attacks
Available at Drink Level 3

intoxicated-assault-3.name: Intoxicated Assault (3) (Drink level 3+)
intoxicated-assault-3.name_ja: 酩酊襲 （3段目 酔いLv3以上）
notes: A counter followed by a sequence of attacks
Available at Drink Level 3

ransui-haze-1.name: Ransui Haze (1) (Drink level 4+)
ransui-haze-1.name_ja: 乱酔旋 (1段目 酔いLv4以上)
notes: Drink level 4 or higher

ransui-haze-2.name: Ransui Haze (2) (Drink level 4+)
ransui-haze-2.name_ja: 乱酔旋 (2段目 酔いLv4以上)
notes: Available at Drink Level 4
Transitions even when the attack misses
During the attack, press an attack button with specific timing to change the transition attack
Frames 6-25: Ransui Haze 1
Frames 31-55: Ransui Haze 2
Frames 64-80: Ransui Haze 3

ransui-haze-3-immediate.name: Ransui Haze (3 Immediate) (Drink level 4+)
ransui-haze-3-immediate.name_ja: 乱酔旋 (3段目/即派生 酔いLv4以上)
notes: Available at Drink Level 4

ransui-haze-3-delayed.name: Ransui Haze (3 Delayed) (Drink level 4+)
ransui-haze-3-delayed.name_ja: 乱酔旋 (3段目/ディレイ派生 酔いLv4以上)
notes: Available at Drink Level 4

ransui-haze-3-maximum-delay.name: Ransui Haze (3 Maximum Delay) (Drink level 4+)
ransui-haze-3-maximum-delay.name_ja: 乱酔旋 (3段目/大幅ディレイ派生 酔いLv4以上)
notes: Available at Drink Level 4
Recovers 10,000 Drive Gauge

the-devil-inside.name: The Devil Inside
notes: Take out a gourd for a swig of a ki-unleashing drink. Raises your drink level, with higher levels unlocking access to additional moves
Adds a Drink level on frame 49
If Drink level is already at 4, recovers 5,000 Drive Gauge
Holding the button continues the action, and will only add to the Drink level for as long as the button is held
When the button is held for only one level, the entire move is 97 frames
Damage increases in line with Drink level, and new moves are available
Damage scaling per Drin kLevel
Drink Level 0: 90%
Drink Level 1: 95%
Drink Level 2: 100%
Drink Level 3: 105%
Drink Level 4: 110%
During The Devil’s Song, damage is scaled to 105%
the-devil-inside.notes_sc: Increases Jamie's Drink Level by 1 (hold for more levels); builds 0.25 Drive bars per drink; if already at DL4, builds 0.5 Drive bars per drink; can hold the button to continue drinking indefinitely; entire animation is in a counter-hit state; Drink Level affects moveset and base damage scaling (90/95/100/105/110% for DL0-DL4 respectively)

freeflow-strikes-light-1.name: Freeflow Strikes (1) (Light)
notes: Move forward while performing three attacks with your fists. Useful for starting combos from regular attacks

freeflow-strikes-light-1-drink-level-4.name: Freeflow Strikes (1) (Light) (Drink level 4)

swagger-step-light.name: Swagger Step (Light)
notes: Quickly lunge toward your opponent and strike with the heel of your palm. Useful as a surprise attack that closes the distance with your opponent

swagger-step-medium.name: Swagger Step (Medium)
notes: Quickly lunge toward your opponent and strike with the heel of your palm. Useful as a surprise attack that closes the distance with your opponent

swagger-step-heavy.name: Swagger Step (Heavy)
notes: Quickly lunge toward your opponent and strike with the heel of your palm. Useful as a surprise attack that closes the distance with your opponent

swagger-step-od.name: Swagger Step (OD)
notes: Quickly lunge toward your opponent and strike with the heel of your palm. Useful as a surprise attack that closes the distance with your opponent
Produces a wall splat on Punish Counter

swagger-hermit-punch.name: Swagger Hermit Punch
notes: A follow-up attack performed out of Swagger Step, unleashing an even more devastating strike with the heel of your palm. It does very high damage, making it particularly powerful in combos or as a surprise attack
Available at Drink Level 4

swagger-hermit-punch-od.name: Swagger Hermit Punch (OD)
notes: A follow-up attack performed out of Swagger Step, unleashing an even more devastating strike with the heel of your palm. It does very high damage, making it particularly powerful in combos or as a surprise attack
Available at Drink Level 4

arrow-kick-light.name: Arrow Kick (Light)
notes: Launch your opponent into the air with a kick, and then use the recoil to follow up with a flying kick. Useful as an anti-air counter to an opponent's jumping attacks, and as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 12
Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 12

arrow-kick-medium.name: Arrow Kick (Medium)
notes: Launch your opponent into the air with a kick, and then use the recoil to follow up with a flying kick. Useful as an anti-air counter to an opponent's jumping attacks, and as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14
Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14

arrow-kick-heavy.name: Arrow Kick (Heavy)
notes: Launch your opponent into the air with a kick, and then use the recoil to follow up with a flying kick. Useful as an anti-air counter to an opponent's jumping attacks, and as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 16
Will only transition to the 2nd hit and after when the first attack hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 16

arrow-kick-od.name: Arrow Kick (OD)
notes: Launch your opponent into the air with a kick, and then use the recoil to follow up with a flying kick. Useful as an anti-air counter to an opponent's jumping attacks, and as a way to close out combos
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 10 - 12
The second hit and subsequent attacks only come out if the first attack hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 10 - 12

luminous-dive-kick-light.name: Luminous Dive Kick (Light)
notes: While jumping, extend your leg and quickly descend to the ground. Useful as a surprise attack, or as a way to approach your opponent
Available at Drink Level 1 and higher

luminous-dive-kick-medium.name: Luminous Dive Kick (Medium)
notes: While jumping, extend your leg and quickly descend to the ground. Useful as a surprise attack, or as a way to approach your opponent
Available at Drink Level 1 and higher

luminous-dive-kick-heavy.name: Luminous Dive Kick (Heavy)
notes: While jumping, extend your leg and quickly descend to the ground. Useful as a surprise attack, or as a way to approach your opponent
Available at Drink Level 1 and higher

luminous-dive-kick-od.name: Luminous Dive Kick (OD)
notes: While jumping, extend your leg and quickly descend to the ground. Useful as a surprise attack, or as a way to approach your opponent
Available at Drink Level 1 and higher

bakkai-light.name: Bakkai (Light)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks while sliding along the ground. This move does big damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Available at Drink Level 2 or higher
Invincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 24
The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

bakkai-medium.name: Bakkai (Medium)
notes: Available at Drink Level 2 or higher
Invincible to projectiles from frames 4 - 26
The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

bakkai-heavy.name: Bakkai (Heavy)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks while sliding along the ground. This move does big damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Available at Drink Level 2 or higher
Invincible to projectiles from frames 5 - 33
The last hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

bakkai-od.name: Bakkai (OD)
notes: Drink level 2 or higher
A series of rotating, upside-down kicks while sliding along the ground. This move does big damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Invincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 28
Only the 7th hit can be canceled into SA3/Critical Art

tenshin.name: Tenshin
notes: When near opponent
A throw that stops the opponent's movements by thrusting a finger in front of their eyes. After the hit connects, it can be followed up with a swift attack
Available at Drink Level 3 or higher
Combo scaling starts from the 3rd hit

tenshin-od.name: Tenshin (OD)
notes: When near opponent
A throw that stops the opponent's movements by thrusting a finger in front of their eyes. After the hit connects, it can be followed up with a swift attack
Available at Drink Level 3 or higher
Produces a crumple stun on hit

breakin.name: Breakin'
notes: A sequence of acrobatic rotating kicks at high speed. During the attack, keep holding down to raise your drink level
Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 12
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
While the attack is executed, continue to hold Down to change the attack’s properties and raise your Drink level by 1

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to throws and strikes from frames 1 - 12

breakin.notes_sc: Damage DL0-DL4: 1980/2084/2200/2304/2420 (Chip: 450/472/500/522/550); holding Down will result in a Drink ender; cannot hit cross-up; leaves 16f blockstring gap before 2nd set of kicks (12f in Burnout)

the-devils-song.name: The Devil's Song
notes: Unleash even stronger ki by taking a big gulp from your gourd. Your drink level will be maxed out for a period of time after finishing the move
Temporarily raises Drink level to 4
Note: Damage is increased to 105%
Timer is active for 900 frames
If this move is performed when the player is already at Drink level 4, the player instead recovers 30,000 to the Drive Gauge

getsuga-saiho.name: Getsuga Saiho
notes: A sequence of attacks that breaks an opponent's posture, and then finishes by kicking them into the air after forcing them to take a swing at you. After the opponent has been launched, it is possible to continue your offensive with a follow-up attack
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Produces a hard knockdown

getsuga-saiho-ca.name: Getsuga Saiho (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality

A sequence of attacks that breaks an opponent's posture, and then finishes by kicking them into the air after forcing them to take a swing at you. After the opponent has been launched, it is possible to continue your offensive with a follow-up attack
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 12
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Forces a hard knockdown

back-shaver.name: Back Shaver
notes: When near opponent
Lean your back into your opponent and send them tumbling backwards with three strong strikes. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Hold down the button during the technique to change its properties and raise drink level by 1
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

wheel-punch.name: Wheel Punch
notes: When near opponent
Crumple your opponent with a kick, then roll over them before sending them packing with another kick. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
